comments: Approved. The drafted contract is consistent with the recon packet and satisfies the requested gate. Scope is limited to creating and populating the new documentation/ tree and modifying README.md as a minimalist navigator; allowed_files further constrains write scope to README.md and documentation/** only. The contract also strictly prohibits deleting or relocating existing docs/ or protocol/ files, explicitly forbids bootstrap scripts, and explicitly forbids MCP/server/runtime changes. Recon guidance is also preserved by keeping execution artifacts out of modification scope while allowing only the designated result artifacts under tasks/.
